name: bouncer-api
description: Bouncer PDP API - Policy Decision Point

authModes.note: JSON has no comments; this block documents how to switch the API between mocked-subject and real OIDC. The repo ships .env.demo and .env.oidc templates with sensible defaults; .env is a symlink to whichever one you want active.
authModes.switch:
ln -sf .env.demo .env   # mock mode
ln -sf .env.oidc .env   # OIDC mode (Keycloak by default)

mock.behavior: Trust X-Actor-Uid header. Every route is open. Path-admin grant gate enforces only when the header is set.

oidc.behavior: Verify Authorization: Bearer <jwt> against OIDC_ISSUER's JWKS. Required on every non-public route (allowlist: /health, /openapi.*, /docs, /auth/config). On first login the API JIT-creates a common.subjects row from the token's preferred_username/email/sub.
